candidates.title: YAML catalog + runtime resolver
candidates.why: Best balance of deterministic execution, reviewability, and incremental rollout

candidates.title: Docs-only catalog
candidates.why: Fast to start but weak runtime enforcement

candidates.title: DB-first catalog
candidates.why: High early complexity; keep as later optimization

candidates.title: Protein-only inference
candidates.why: Too narrow for heterogeneous skills, scripts, and checklists

architecture_decisions.decision: Use unified option ontology: atomic + composite nodes with typed edges
architecture_decisions.reason: Single query model for scripts, skills, and checklists

architecture_decisions.decision: Keep canonical option source in versioned YAML
architecture_decisions.reason: Git reviewability, diffability, and rollback safety

architecture_decisions.decision: Resolver emits bounded pre-context execution bundle
architecture_decisions.reason: Prevents ad hoc executor replanning and tool drift

architecture_decisions.decision: Reuse planning trace taxonomy for observability and scoring
architecture_decisions.reason: Immediate compatibility with existing CHUM trace evaluation

architecture_decisions.decision: Executor runs only declared steps unless replanning trigger
architecture_decisions.reason: Reduces blast radius and enforces ceremony policy

plan.what: Implement execution option catalog with deterministic pre-context bundles
plan.why: Reduce tool-selection drift and make pathways queryable before execution
risks: Schema too loose leads to inconsistent options
dod_checks: Resolver returns deterministic bundle for identical input
Planning trace captures selected option and step-level metadata

workstreams.title: Define option schema and validator
acceptance: Schema covers atomic and composite options
CI fails on missing nodes, invalid edges, or cycles

workstreams.title: Seed catalog from proteins and scripts
acceptance: At least one react preflight composite
At least one design review composite

workstreams.title: Implement resolver and handoff contract
acceptance: ResolveExecutionOption returns ordered steps and gates

workstreams.title: Integrate resolver into planning and dispatch
acceptance: Bundle is persisted into planning trace metadata

workstreams.title: Add trace-driven option scoring
acceptance: Score adjustments derive from plan_agreed, gate_fail, and rollback signals
Planner ranking uses persisted score adjustments
